name: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Suspicious Load DLL and Extexport Execution
notes:
This Building Block detects when a user installs certificates by using CertOC.exe to loads the target DLL file. This also detects Extexport.exe loads dll and is execute from other folder the original path.

Covered from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: frack113
SIGMA Title: Suspicious Extexport Execution
SIGMA Description: Extexport.exe loads dll and is execute from other folder the original path

Original Author: Austin Songer @austinsonger
SIGMA Title: DLL Loaded via CertOC.EXE
SIGMA Description: Detects when a user installs certificates by using CertOC.exe to loads the target DLL file.


Confidence: LOW

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
bb_references: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Suspicious Load DLL and Extexport Execution on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success
when the event matches Process Name (custom) is any of [Extexport.exe or certoc.exe or CertOC.exe or extexport.exe]
when the event matches (LOWER("Command") LIKE '%extexport.exe%') or (LOWER("Command") LIKE '% -loaddll %' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '% /loaddll %') AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY BB:BehaviorDefinition: Suspicious Load DLL and Extexport Execution on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success
AND when the event matches Process Name (custom) is any of [Extexport.exe or certoc.exe or CertOC.exe or extexport.exe]
AND when the event matches (LOWER("Command") LIKE '%extexport.exe%') or (LOWER("Command") LIKE '% -loaddll %' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '% /loaddll %') AQL filter query
